reviews.comment:
No tienen agua caliente para el mate. No paro nunca mas.

(Translated by Google)
They don't have hot water for mate. I'm never stopping again.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNVMHBxVWl3RRAB

reviews.comment:
Estación de servicio con minimercado. Encontrará una amplia variedad de productos. Posee una plaza para que se entretengan los niños

(Translated by Google)
Gas station with a convenience store. You'll find a wide variety of products. It also has a children's play area.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNVb29McXBRRRAB

reviews.comment:
Completa, bien abastecida y con todos los servicios. Tiene juegos para los chicos y la comida que se ofrece es muy rica. Las medialunas tienen un tamaño que, basicamente, es el doble de las que venden en otro local.

(Translated by Google)
Complete, well-stocked, and with all the amenities. It has a play area for children, and the food is delicious. The croissants are basically twice the size of those sold at other places.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNVdkx5bmxnRRAB

reviews.comment:
Hermoso lugar para ser una linda, tranquila y a su vez divertida en.el viaje. Cuenta con.un pelotero para los chicos amplio, al.lado de la cafeteria. Juegos fuera. Baños. Lindo sitio para hacer parada como.parte del.viaje. Recomendable

(Translated by Google)
A beautiful place for a relaxing and fun break during your trip. It has a large ball pit for children next to the cafeteria, outdoor games, and restrooms. A great place to stop as part of your journey. Highly recommended.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNVdk1DR213RRAB

reviews.comment:
Buena atemcion del personal, bien la limpieza!!!

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service from the staff, and the cleanliness was great!
